scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist && cp vendor/bevo-agent-sdk/dist/index.js node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist/index.js && cp vendor/bevo-agent-sdk/dist/index.js node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist/index.cjs && cp vendor/bevo-agent-sdk/dist/index.d.ts node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist/index.d.ts && cp vendor/bevo-agent-sdk/dist/index.d.mts node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist/index.d.mts && (cp vendor/bevo-agent-sdk/dist/index.mjs node_modules/@bevo/agent-sdk/dist/index.mjs 2>/dev/null || true)
